pages.text: There are 5 tiers of magic circles:$(br2)$(l)T1 - Initiate$(): 3x3, basic auras$(br)$(l)T2 - Adept$(): 5x5, remote mana, healing$(br)$(l)T3 - Master$(): 9x9 with pillars, flight, weather, teleportation$(br)$(l)T4 - Archon$(): 13x13, chunkloading, convergence$(br)$(l)T5 - Primordial$(): 17x17, world-scale infrastructure

Circles upgrade in-place. Build a T1, then expand outward to T2 by adding the outer ring. The core stays in the center.$(br2)Higher-tier blocks can substitute for lower-tier requirements. An Awakened Rune Stone works anywhere a Lesser Rune Stone is needed.
